     The Numbers Business Report

Joker (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $335,451,311Details
International Box Office $743,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $1,078,751,311
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $18,680,196
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $39,012,774
Total $57,692,970
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Arthur Fleck, is of a man struggling to find his way in Gotham’s fractured society. A clown-for-hire by day, he aspires to be a stand-up comic at night…but finds the joke always seems to be on him. Caught in a cyclical existence between apathy and cruelty, Arthur makes one bad decision that brings about a chain reaction of escalating events in this gritty character study.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$96,202,337 (28.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 19.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,374 opening theaters/4,374 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $437,986,239

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 4th, 2019 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: October 2nd, 2019 (Wide), released as Джокер (Russia (CIS))
October 2nd, 2019 (Wide) (India)
October 2nd, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 2nd, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
October 3rd, 2019 (Wide) (Italy)
Video Release: December 17th, 2019 by Warner Home Video
February 10th, 2020 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, disturbing behavior, language and brief sexual images.
(Rating bulletin 2593 (Cert #52301), 8/28/2019)
Running Time: 122 minutes
Franchise: Batman, Joker
Award nomination: 2020 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: About a Stand Up Comedian, Crime, Mental Illness, Origin Story, Poverty, Social Outcast
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Village Roadshow Productions, Bron Creative, Joint Effort, Warner Bros., DC Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Arthur Fleck, is of a man struggling to find his way in Gotham’s fractured society. A clown-for-hire by day, he aspires to be a stand-up comic at night…but finds the joke always seems to be on him. Caught in a cyclical existence between apathy and cruelty, Arthur makes one bad decision that brings about a chain reaction of escalating events in this gritty character study.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$96,202,337 (28.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 19.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,374 opening theaters/4,374 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $437,986,239

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 4th, 2019 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: October 2nd, 2019 (Wide), released as Джокер (Russia (CIS))

February 10th, 2020 by Warner Home Video

(Rating bulletin 2593 (Cert #52301), 8/28/2019)

Award nomination: 2020 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
